body:
Felix, thanks for the note — always good to hear from you. I've been thinking more about the [Verdant Grid](startups/verdant-grid) opportunity since we last connected, and I think there's a real chance for our two firms to structure something together at the Series A. Their grid-edge inference stack is genuinely differentiated, and I'd rather move quickly than let this one drift into a crowded process. Would you have 30 minutes later this week to sync on where Accel's head is at on the deal? Happy to share our preliminary diligence notes if that helps align the conversation.

Amara
